Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Standard Hire to Retire HtR posting job ad then screen candidates then conduct interviews then make hiring decision then onboard employee then add to payroll then close case

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Model1 After Screen both Decide and Interview are reachable in any order after Screen so you could Decide before Interview making hiring decision before interviewing

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Interview has no constraint to precede Decide or Onboard or Payroll or Close so the model does not require interview before hiring onboarding payroll or case closure

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Thus Model1 anomaly is that the process can hire a person before interview and treats interview as detached from the core hiring path

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Model2 has Post before both Screen and Interview so after Post you can do Screen and Interview in any order which means Interview can occur before Screen

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Model2 also has Interview before Decide so it correctly enforces that hiring decision cannot happen before interview

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The onboarding loop means Onboard can be repeated multiple times and the payroll xor means Payroll can be skipped entirely before Close

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Thus Model2 anomalies are possible interview before screening repeated onboarding and optional payroll before closure

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Decision before interview is a more fundamental violation of hiring logic than allowing interview before screening because the former breaks the essence of candidate evaluation before selection

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Although optional payroll in Model2 is serious Model2 still preserves the central relation interview before decision whereas Model1 breaks that core dependency

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Therefore Model2 is closer to a normative Hire to Retire process because it keeps the hiring decision after interviews while Model1 allows hiring to proceed without interview based justification
